why: Self-asserted within the auto-spec leash. Charter reframed to marketplace-interaction only (discover/acquire+source/crew) + AXI output contract adopted (#1-6/#8-10, #7 deferred) as a shared reference node cross-cutting every marketplace node; legacy domains recorded as out-of-charter tenants, not backfilled.
